name: chain_my_bot_scanned_400000_wallets_to_find_t
method:
my bot scanned 400,000 wallets to find the best trader on polymarket

$4.7M profit. 91% win rate. 23,000 positions.

then i found 30 wallets doing the exact same trades within 800 milliseconds of his

stages.task: Query Polygon blockchain for Polymarket wallet positions and PnL using free RPC (Alchemy/Infura free tier or public RPC)
Cluster wallets by funding source, trade timing correlation (<1s), and position overlap. Identify parent-child groups.
Convert top 3 whale clusters into Twitter threads with specific numbers, wallet addresses (truncated), and timing analysis
